title: Create: America
description: A modpack about guns, factories, and Democracy.
body:
**This modpack is all about guns, factories, and Spreading Democracy.**

## **1. Guns - "Timeless and Classics Zero" Mod:**
This mod adds a variety of classic and timeless firearms into Minecraft, offering a selection of weapons such as pistols, rifles, shotguns, and sniper rifles.
The mod includes realistic gun mechanics, such as reloading, aiming, and shooting, allowing players to engage in combat with precision.
Guns can be customized with attachments, like scopes, silencers, and different types of ammunition.
The weaponry in this mod provides a focus on combat and defense, allowing players to defend their bases or engage in PvP battles.
## **2. Factories - "Create" Mod:**
The Create mod introduces complex machinery and automation into the game, enabling players to build intricate factory systems.
Players can craft a wide range of mechanical contraptions, such as conveyor belts, rotating wheels, crushing mills, and automated crafting setups.
The mod allows for the creation of fully automated resource gathering, item processing, and production chains, allowing players to scale up operations and make their factories more efficient.
It also includes engineering mechanics, where players need to set up energy sources, such as waterwheels and windmills, to power their machines and systems.
Also, Use pump jacks to pump sweet juicy oil from the ground, and make it americas property.
## **3. Integration of Guns and Factories:**
Combining Create with Timeless and Classics Zero, players can design automated factories to manufacture materials needed for gun crafting, ammo production, and other equipment.
The automation features of Create can help players build massive production lines to gather resources for weaponry, while using guns to protect their industrial complexes from threats like hostile mobs or other players.
The combination of guns for defense and automation for production allows for both offensive and defensive strategies in survival or multiplayer modes.
## **4. Resource Management and Progression:**
Players will need to gather resources to fuel both their Create machines (for creating power, processing ores, and manufacturing goods) and their gun-related needs (like crafting ammo and maintaining firearms).
The modpack encourages resource optimization, where players use their factories to gather materials efficiently and their guns to defend their operations or venture out to collect rare resources.
The progression system often involves upgrading both your weaponry and factories over time, aiming for more powerful guns and more advanced automation.
## **5. Multiplayer Experience:**
In multiplayer, players can work together to build massive factories or establish gun-based defenses around their bases.
The interplay between the creative power of automated factories and the tactical use of firearms opens up opportunities for both large-scale cooperation and intense PvP combat.
In summary, this gun and factory modpack combines the thrill of realistic combat with advanced industrial automation. Players can immerse themselves in creating vast production lines with Create while also crafting and using classic firearms to protect their creations or dominate in battles.

(either host your own server or use essential or e4mc, which is provided in the modpack)
